summary: Made one surgical exit edit to bridge more directly into Chapter 16's opening image of Riva's old funeral ferry forcing through the reeds behind Daro's prayer boats. The opening already aligned cleanly with the prior boundary context, so it was left intact.
edits: Revised the final sentence to show the old funeral ferry tearing free of the reeds and following after Daro's departing skiffs.
Verified the style bible excerpt contained no `example_lines` entries to remove from the chapter.
